full_text:
Cao Ju 曹據
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Ju (曹據)was born in Pei. Punished for having his men produce illegal goods. Lived in south for his health. Cao Ju was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
